intent_template: Is {name} taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?
intent: Is Dr. Gerhardt Vössing taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?

fuzzy_match: No, Dr. Gerhardt Vössing is not accepting new graduate students. Note: I am not taking new Ph.D. students in the 2025-2026 admissions cycle. Students interested in microeconomic theory at Halvern are encouraged to contact Professor A. Marchetti or Professor S. Liang.

eval.reference_answer_raw_annotation: No, Dr. Gerhardt Vössing is not accepting new graduate students. Note: I am not taking new Ph.D. students in the 2025-2026 admissions cycle. Students interested in microeconomic theory at Halvern are encouraged to contact Professor A. Marchetti or Professor S. Liang.
